utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding keys. Now check if each is fully specified with costs and required details: 1) health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance with individual costs and a total, plus included features—meets requirement. 2) property_coverage: specifies home/contents insurance with costs and features—meets requirement. 3) travel_coverage: specifies travel insurance with costs and features—meets requirement. 4) additional_services: specifies enhancement services with costs and features—meets requirement. 5) total_budget: provides monthly and annual cost breakdown—meets requirement. All items are present and fully specified.
